LightningComponentBundle.description: Term Builder shell: a tabset (Shell Creation / Modeling / Performance) with a contract KPI band + Proposal Summary. Owns the per-Term demo model cache and syncs with the other tiles over the DLM Term Builder channel. Numbers are mock, session-only.

property.name: headingLabel
property.label: Heading Label
property.description: Title shown above the workbench tabs. Leave blank for the default 'Negotiation Workbench'.

property.name: showContractBand
property.label: Show Contract KPI Band
property.description: Show the always-visible contract-wide KPI band above the tabs.

property.name: showProposalAction
property.label: Show Proposal Summary Action
property.description: Show the Proposal Summary button in the shell chrome.

property.name: shellCreationLabel
property.label: Shell Creation Tab Label
property.description: Label for the first tab (the Term Workspace). Default 'Shell Creation'.

property.name: modelingLabel
property.label: Modeling Tab Label
property.description: Label for the Modeling tab. Default 'Modeling'.

property.name: performanceLabel
property.label: Performance Tab Label
property.description: Label for the Performance placeholder tab. Default 'Performance'.
